case_title: CACH, LLC VS. BERNARDO MAYORGA AKA BERNARDO MAYORGA SR AKA

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BERNARDO MAYORGA AKA BERNARDO MAYORGA SR AKA BERNARDO J MAYORGA SR SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-28-2014
